name: Intrinsically Disordered Region (IDR) Binder Design
description: Design protein/peptide binders to intrinsically disordered regions with RFdiffusion. Tested by designing binders for 18 synthetic peptides sequences 21 diverse, therapeutically relevant, intrinsically disordered regions. Found binders for 39 of 43 targets.
capabilities: Design protein/peptide binders to intrinsically disordered regions with RFdiffusion
Tested by designing binders for 18 synthetic peptides sequences 21 diverse, therapeutically relevant, intrinsically disordered regions. Found binders for 39 of 43 targets

target_sequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the intrinsically disordered region target

target_structure.description: PDB structure of the target protein containing the IDR

num_designs.description: Number of binder designs to generate

binder_length.description: Length of the designed binder protein
